name: GRC-ProbNet: Uncertainty-aware Feature Extraction for Cardiovascular Disease Classification
summary: arXiv:2607.10357v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The automatic detection and classification of cardiovascular disease (CVD) from computed tomography (CT) images plays an important role in clinical...
description: arXiv:2607.10357v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The automatic detection and classification of cardiovascular disease (CVD) from computed tomography (CT) images plays an important role in clinical practice. Recently, a hybrid pipeline (GRC-Net) for CVD classification was proposed, which leverages a deep-learning-based segmentation and registration method to extract radiomic and geometric featu...
author: Yash Shah, Omar Todd, Philipp Seeb\"ock, Georg Langs, Ben Glocker, Raghav Mehta
